matchRecap.summary: France defeated Senegal 3-1. France was picked by Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard.
Norway routed Iraq 4-1. Norway was picked by Team Jordan and Team Megatronless.
Argentina shut out Algeria 3-0. Argentina was picked by Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, Team Jordan, Team koyn, and Team Camouflage Cndm.

leaderboardSummary: With no standings changes, Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz remains in first place. Argentina's win contributed points to several teams, but no significant movement occurred yesterday.
lookingAhead: Today features Panama against Ghana, with neither team picked by any contest entries. Later, Colombia faces Uzbekistan; Colombia is a pick for Bijan Mustard and Team Mack.
